name: billing_plans
description: Manage billing plans — updates an account billing plan, queues downgrade billing plan request for an account, reserved: purchase additional envelopes. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The external account number (int) or account ID GUID.

parameters.name: preview_billing_plan
parameters.description: When **true,** updates the account using a preview billing plan.
